description_long: This is a modern, multi-story residential house with a flat roof and a boxy, geometric design. The exterior is primarily light gray, with large windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, allowing for ample natural light. The property is surrounded by a low, green hedge and features several blossoming trees, adding a touch of nature and privacy. There is a spacious outdoor patio area with seating, partially enclosed by the hedge, and a separate garage structure adjacent to the main house. The rooftop includes a terrace with outdoor furniture and some greenery, providing additional living space. The main entryway is accessible via a set of steps and is accentuated by a small porch and decorative landscaping.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a surrounding hedge with blossoming trees. Features include a rooftop terrace, outdoor patio, and a separate garage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main house, large windows, rooftop terrace, and a section of the hedge with blossoming trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard patio, dense hedge, and the garage structure separated from the main house.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the garage, more of the hedge, and the rooftop terrace with visible outdoor furniture.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entryway with steps, porch, and landscaping, as well as the garage and a blossoming tree.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a small porch, and decorative landscaping; modern door design with minimal overhang.
